---
title: Settings Template
description: A standard user profile and preferences layout built using Nirmaan UI components.
---

import { SettingsTemplate } from '@nirman/components';
import Playground from '../../../components/Playground.astro';

The `SettingsTemplate` is a comprehensive **Layer 3 (Template)** layout that provides a robust starting point for dashboard settings, user profiles, or preference menus. It seamlessly integrates `Input`, `Autocomplete`, `Toggle`, and `Button` components inside a responsive grid structure.

## 1. Interactive Preview

This interactive demo shows how the template organizes multiple form elements and semantic categories into a cohesive view. 

<Playground>
  <div style={{ transform: 'scale(0.85)', transformOrigin: 'top center', width: '100%', height: '600px', overflowY: 'auto' }}>
    <SettingsTemplate client:load />
  </div>
</Playground>

## 2. Developer Implementation

The settings template is designed to accept an initial data object and handle complex multi-field form updates automatically.

```tsx
import { SettingsTemplate } from '@nirman/components';

function UserSettingsPage() {
  const initialProfileData = {
    firstName: 'Arjun',
    lastName: 'Kumar',
    email: 'arjun@nirmaan.org',
    timezone: 'IST',
    marketingEmails: false,
    securityAlerts: true,
  };

  const handleSaveSettings = (updatedData) => {
    console.log('Saving profile...', updatedData);
  };

  return (
    <SettingsTemplate 
      title="User Preferences"
      subtitle="Manage your personal details and system notifications."
      initialData={initialProfileData}
      onSave={handleSaveSettings}
      isSaving={false}
    />
  );
}

export default UserSettingsPage;
```

## 3. Customization & Props

| Prop | Type | Description |
| ---- | ---- | ----------- |
| `title` | `string` | The main `h1` heading. Defaults to "Account Settings". |
| `subtitle` | `string` | Descriptive text below the title. |
| `initialData` | `object` | An object containing fields `firstName`, `lastName`, `email`, `timezone`, `marketingEmails`, `securityAlerts`. |
| `timezoneOptions` | `AutocompleteOption[]` | Custom array of timezone options for the dropdown. |
| `isSaving` | `boolean` | When `true`, disables the primary button and switches it to a loading state. |
| `onSave` | `(data) => void` | Triggers when the user successfully submits the form, returning the updated state object. |
